name: Summoning arms a spellbook (auto-equip)
description: Clicking SUMMON adds a Lv1 spellbook that auto-equips into an empty slot in the equipped slots row.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
The inventory strip contains the text 'INVENTORY — EMPTY'
A book with a Lv1 badge is visible in one of the six equipped slots
Click the SUMMON button once more
Two books with Lv1 badges are visible in the equipped slots
